## Is your idea related to a problem?

Describe what's wrong now.

## Your suggestion

What exactly should be added / changed?

## Why does it fit the mod?

How does this fit the Memory Leak concept?

## Alternatives

Are there other ways to solve the same problem?

## Additional context

Screenshots, lore references, etc.
